changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE organization_security_certificates ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, organization_security_certificates_type ExternalAnalyticsType DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, private_key text DEFAULT NULL, public_key text DEFAULT NULL, is_active boolean DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_organization_security_certificates PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_organization_security_certificates_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_organization_security_certificates_organization ON organization_security_certificates (organization_id);
